content: Pollux ramona is cancerous if they are the only left not nerfed, they can just stack sni marks on everyone, like 20~30 sin marks on everyone is enough to get enough dmg for a one shot turn
They can get this in like turn 3 or 4
oh
you dont get it
ask fat guava

It seems ramona may be an enabler of this problems? 
What is the major problematic part of each of this teams that could be changed?
Ramona's copy card
And 3 arithmetica regen at 0 cost
You basically use 3 arith regen then copy 3 arith regen to get 6 arithmetica total
And counting from starter arithmetica is 3, which make it 9 total
You equip 2 cost titan blade which make it 7
so this is the major problem? what could be a way to keep her relevant but less abusable? maybe the copy card can't copy one of her own?
Then use the 3 arithmetica regen + 3 draw cards because you started 2nd
So it's 10 arithmetica and with enhanced dmg by 25%, you X card and it's a one shot
This is about the same abusable part that also affect the other teams she is in?

Ramona's kit can be a copy card and stuff, since her kit is mostly support and can't do much but i think it should regen 2 arith instead of 3 because one of the examples is gdoll, her 1 cost can only regen 2 arith and need prepare to make it 0 cost even though it also have draw 1 card on it too but you have to chose between one of those 2
Meanwhile ramona is a 0 cost that regen 3 arith
2nd is her copy card is just too strong on some DPS and completely useless on others
Can you ask to revert the mulligan changes? I hate it.
The strat i told you about is just from kath btw, it's a turn 1 setup nuke that one shot someone without being able to counterplay
For daffodils you just copy her 2 cost that scale
And spam it
Since you copied it, it will be duped into your deck
And it's just a spam fest
so what could we change ramona or the other problematic unit that interract with her copy?
For pollux you can spam more sin marks skills so it's easier to setup a one shot turn with 20+ sin marks on everyone
maybe a cap on daff copy per turn?
That makes thing more rng, but the original one don't make setups too consistent?

Daff felt fine after the nerf where revive causes her to lose all stacks she built up.
Kinda just flipping coins in this meta to see if you can kill your opponents carry in 3 turns.

Nerfs pollux in general, his sin marks shouldn't be allowed to permanently reduce max HP, temporarily maybe? And it revert if cleansed

Kath can switch into arachne support, her X card is just that stupid, although it will be a bit more healthy because it's not as fast setup

Daff won't be nerfed at all, you generally just want to copy her cards to spam it more
Generally you just need 3 or 4 copy of daff's skill to be in your deck so it wouldn't matter
But at the same time, they can just build a stall team around daff and it's like the problem never changed
It stopped the worst case of bricking hard when the key card you need is stuck at the bottom of the deck for 4 turns.
Mulligan do need to be reverted back tbh
Too many times i discard everything, then i wait turn end for 1 turn, i draw them back
That's what I want. Gimme more stall teams so the game lasts longer. Feels more interactive than everyone dead in 3 turns.
Yeah and also can strat + adapt more
The mulligan rework is felt even worse on draft
When you have the x2 deck relic
It's just the cherry on the top
You discard full strike hand
You draw strike again
Back to back to back
Fk off
I loved the bottom deck mulligans for draft.
Yeah
At least it gives you some way to strat on a RNG af gamemode
Now it's just RNG on a RNG gamemode on a RNG pvp

Ok, so the current propositions would be to:
- Reduce the aritmetica from Ramona 0 cost to 2
- Nerf Pollux sin marks to not permanently reduce max hp
- Kath X cost should halve the damage per arithetica after spending 5\6
- Revert the mullingan changes
Would be happy if the patch notes looked like that.
Kath X card cost 0 arithmetica, it just takes whatever arithmetica you have and add damages based on the consumed arithmetica
Can we have more a more direct suggestion about Kath?
It need to have the damage lowered or mechanics changed?
I feel like the card is hard to fix. Damage that doesn't oneshot is very bad because it fully charges the opponents exalt.
Can consume arithmetica but after a certain arithmetica consumed like for example 5 or 6, the damages per arithmetica consumed is halved
True but you can't really recover properly from a turn 1 one shot on your DPS
You can try to stall but they can focus your revive support next without any worries about their own DPS being sniped
even if ramona card is 2 it would still one shot, right?
If they start 2nd yeah
They just wait 1 turn, it's not turn 1 but turn 2 one shot
we can propose it, or at least flagh the problem
They get 4 arith from copied arith regen + 3 from the chest that start 2nd
I won't say it's a perfect strat to balance kath but at least an idea of balancing
Because right now her X card can just say fk to anyone turn 1
<@332573289438380032> Ok, now look at the propositions and give me the easiest to comprehend description and pich on why they need to be changed, and put it on the list
I think everything should be nerfed except my babygirl pollux

- Kath : X card damages reworks ( example : after 5 or 6 arithmetica consumed, halve the damages dealt from nexts arithmetica consumed )

- Pollux : Sin marks shouldn't be perma erasing your max HP, because his supposedly 1 cost dealing 5 dmg is actually 10 dmg with half of it having permanent effects, if you really want the max HP decreasing mechanism then at least make it temporary just like Saya that can only increase max HP until it gets dispelled.

- Daff : you just spam her 2 cost, turn 2 can snipe someone and after that it's just a 1 turn kill with her 2 cost doing more and more dmg, they just have to manage their deck into not making it reshuffle to kind of making it infinite redraw

- Mulligan : revert back the changes, it was actually a features that gives more skills knowing what to discard to make it last draw depending on who you're fighting, now it's just RNG, you can actually draw full strike hand, discard it and draw strike again, it's even more apparent in draft mode
daff getting an indirect nerf? i better finish abusing it as much as i can
